character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Participates in combat, hands over a gun to Trelawney, discusses the timeline with the captain, and tends to the wounded.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: Commands the group, organizes the flag, discusses supplies, and oversees the handling of the dead mutineer.

character_dossiers.name: Trelawney
character_dossiers.biography: Exchanges guns with the captain, remains calm during combat, and is described as a skilled marksman.

character_dossiers.name: Gray
character_dossiers.biography: Receives a cutlass from the narrator, demonstrates combat readiness, and participates in the fight.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: Cares for the dying Tom Redruth, expresses remorse, and participates in combat.

character_dossiers.name: Hunter
character_dossiers.biography: Assists the captain in setting up the flag and participates in combat.

character_dossiers.name: Joyce
character_dossiers.biography: Participates in the initial gunfire and helps secure the dead mutineer.

character_dossiers.name: Tom Redruth
character_dossiers.biography: Dies after being shot, remains silent until his death, and is described as a loyal servant.

character_dossiers.name: Job Anderson
character_dossiers.biography: Leads the mutineers in an attack, is killed during the fight.

character_dossiers.name: the boatswain
character_dossiers.biography: Part of the mutineers, described as leading the attack.

character_dossiers.name: Blandly
character_dossiers.biography: Mentioned as the person who will send a ship to find the group if they are not returned by August.
